chunks.text: Ming Wu wins 2020 IEEE EDS Robert Bosch MEMS Award - EECS at Berkeley EE Prof. Ming Wu has been named the 2020 recipient of the IEEE Electron Devices Society (EDS) Robert Bosch Micro and Nano Electro Mechanical Systems (MEMS) Award. The award was established in 2014 “to recognize and honor advances in the invention, design, and/or fabrication of micro- or nano- electromechanical systems and/or devices” with the proviso that individual contributions “be innovative and useful for practical applications.” Wu was selected “For pioneering contributions in MEMS optical switches and optoelectronic tweezers.” Categories Faculty Honors Industry Research View Open Faculty Positions
